mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, risk_desc, impact, probability, measure, owner_id, status, due_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_risk WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, project_id, risk_desc, impact, probability, measure, owner_id, status, due_date, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_risk WHERE deleted = 0 AND due_date < #{today} AND status NOT IN ('RESOLVED', 'CLOSED')
